title: Magminds
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Magminds''' was a member of the [[Human League]] assigned to guard [[Corona House/Legends|Corona House]] during the [[Corellian Crisis|First Corellian Insurrection]]. A colleague of his was calling his name and searching for him when [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] were forced to kill him to keep their escape attempt secret.

==Behind the scenes==
''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' states that ''Magminds'' are the Human League troopers stationed at Corona House, rather than an individual.

==Appearances==
*''[[Assault at Selonia]]'' {{1stm}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
